name: facebook/dpt-dinov2-small-kitti
description: Monocular depth estimation model from Meta. Estimates per-pixel depth from a single RGB image. Trained on KITTI driving data. Good for scene geometry estimation and 3D-aware applications.

name: http
description: HTTP tool worker. Executes outbound HTTP requests as workflow steps. Used for webhook delivery, external API calls, and URL fetching within multi-step pipelines.

name: google/siglip-base-patch16-224
description: Vision-language embedding model from Google. Good for image-text similarity, cross-modal retrieval, and visual content classification. Base variant; faster and lighter than the so400m variant. 768-dimensional output.

name: google/siglip2-so400m-patch14-224
description: Large vision-language embedding model from Google. Higher quality than the base variant for image-text alignment and cross-modal retrieval tasks. 1152-dimensional output. Suited for quality-gated image generation pipelines.

name: cafeai/cafe_aesthetic
description: Aesthetic quality scoring model for images. Rates visual appeal on a continuous scale. Used in quality-gated image generation pipelines to filter low-aesthetic outputs.

name: falconsai/nsfw_image_detection
description: NSFW image classification model. Detects inappropriate or explicit content in images. Used in content moderation pipelines and safety-gated image generation outputs.

name: clip-vit-b-32
description: CLIP ViT-B/32 image-text alignment model. Lightweight variant for computing image-text similarity scores. Used for prompt alignment evaluation in generation quality pipelines.

name: openai/clip-vit-large-patch14
description: CLIP ViT-L/14 from OpenAI. Computes similarity scores between images and text descriptions. Used in quality-gated image generation pipelines to score output against the original prompt.

name: facebook/sam-vit-huge
description: Segment Anything Model (SAM) ViT-Huge from Meta. Produces high-quality segmentation masks from image prompts (points, boxes, or automatic). Requires GPU for practical inference speed.

name: deepseek-ai/deepseek-r1-distill-llama-8b
description: 8B reasoning model distilled from DeepSeek-R1 into the Llama-3 base. Applies extended chain-of-thought before responding. Strong on complex reasoning, coding, and mathematical tasks. Extended KV cache growth during reasoning requires additional memory headroom. MIT licence.

name: deepseek-ai/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-7b
description: 7B reasoning model distilled from DeepSeek-R1 into the Qwen2.5 base. Applies chain-of-thought reasoning before responding. Strong on multi-step problem solving and mathematical reasoning. MIT licence.

name: google/gemma-3-12b-it
description: Gemma 3 12B instruction model from Google. Strong reasoning, coding, and instruction following. 128K context window and multilingual support. Requires HuggingFace access approval.

name: google/gemma-3-27b-it
description: Gemma 3 27B instruction model from Google. Near-frontier quality at 4-bit quantisation (~14GB weights). 128K context window, multimodal architecture, 140+ languages. Requires HuggingFace access approval.

name: google/gemma-3-4b-it
description: Gemma 3 4B instruction model from Google. Good general-purpose chat and reasoning at a small parameter count. Multimodal-capable architecture. Requires HuggingFace access approval.

name: ibm-granite/granite-3.3-8b-instruct
description: 8B instruction model from IBM. Apache 2.0 licence. Designed for enterprise use including RAG, tool use, and structured output. Strong instruction following with focus on reliability and auditability. Good fit for regulated sector workflows.

name: madeagents/hammer2.1-3b
description: 3B instruction model tuned for agentic tool use and function calling. Good for structured action generation, tool-use pipelines, and lightweight agent tasks.

name: meta-llama/llama-3.1-8b-instruct
description: Llama 3.1 8B instruction model from Meta. Strong reasoning, instruction following, and tool use capability. Good GPU-tier general-purpose model. Requires HuggingFace access approval.

name: meta-llama/llama-3.2-1b-instruct
description: Llama 3.2 1B instruction model from Meta. Lightweight and fast on CPU. Good for simple chat, classification, and latency-sensitive tasks where the Llama family is preferred. Requires HuggingFace access approval.

name: microsoft/phi-4
description: 14B instruction model from Microsoft. MIT licence. Strong on reasoning, STEM tasks, and instruction following at 14B scale. Fits on gpu-sm with 4-bit quantisation (~7GB weights, ~10GB total with KV cache).

name: mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct-v0.3
description: 7B instruction model from Mistral AI. Strong English reasoning and instruction following. Widely tested and well understood for general-purpose chat and structured output.

name: qwen/qwen2-0.5b-instruct
description: Compact 0.5B instruction-following model from Alibaba. Good for simple chat, classification, and lightweight text tasks where low latency on CPU matters most.

name: qwen/qwen2-1.5b-instruct
description: 1.5B instruction model from Alibaba. Balances speed and capability for general chat and simple reasoning tasks on CPU.

name: qwen/qwen2.5-7b-instruct
description: 7B instruction model from Alibaba. Strong general-purpose reasoning, instruction following, and multilingual capability. Good CPU-tier workhorse for chat and structured output tasks.

name: qwen/qwen2.5-coder-7b-instruct
description: 7B model specialised for code generation and understanding. Strong on code completion, explanation, debugging, and multi-language programming tasks. Good fit for coding assistant integrations.

name: qwen/qwen3-14b
description: Qwen3 14B dense instruction model from Alibaba. Strong reasoning, multilingual capability, and instruction following. Fits on gpu-sm with 4-bit quantisation (~7GB weights, ~10GB total with KV cache).

name: qwen/qwen3-4b
description: Qwen3 4B dense instruction model. Improved reasoning and instruction following over Qwen2 at the same parameter count. Good for general chat and structured output on CPU.

name: qwen/qwen3-4b-thinking-2507
description: Qwen3 4B model with extended reasoning (thinking) capability. Applies chain-of-thought before responding. KV cache growth during thinking warrants gpu-sm placement over CPU.

name: qwen/qwen3-8b
description: Qwen3 8B dense instruction model. Strong general-purpose reasoning and chat. Efficient on gpu-sm with 4-bit quantisation and good throughput on T4.

name: qwen/qwen3.5-0.8b
description: Very compact 0.8B instruction model. Suited for latency-sensitive tasks, edge-like deployments, and high-throughput lightweight classification or routing.

name: qwen/qwen3.5-9b
description: Qwen3.5 9B dense instruction model. Strong reasoning and instruction following. Runs on gpu-sm with 4-bit quantisation.

name: tiiuae/falcon3-7b-instruct
description: 7B instruction model from the Technology Innovation Institute. Trained on 14 trillion tokens. Strong general-purpose reasoning and instruction following for CPU-tier chat and structured output tasks. Apache 2.0 licence.

name: zai-org/glm-4-9b-0414
description: 9B instruction model from Zhipu AI. Strong multilingual capability with good Chinese and English performance. Suited for bilingual chat and document tasks.

name: baai/bge-m3
description: Dense and sparse text embedding model supporting 100+ languages. Strong on multilingual retrieval, semantic search, and cross-lingual similarity. Good choice for RAG systems with mixed-language content. 1024-dimensional output.

name: baai/bge-small-en-v1.5
description: Small and efficient English embedding model from BAAI. Good balance of speed and quality for English-only semantic search and retrieval. 512-dimensional output.

name: intfloat/multilingual-e5-large-instruct
description: 560M multilingual instruction-following embedding model. Covers 94 languages. Takes an instruction prefix describing the embedding task, improving retrieval quality for domain-specific use cases. MIT licence.

name: microsoft/harrier-oss-v1-0.6b
description: 600M parameter text and image embedding model from Microsoft. Supports web search, semantic similarity, and bitext retrieval. Multimodal capable. 1024-dimensional output. Higher quality than the 270M variant.

name: nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5
description: English text embedding model from Nomic AI. 8192 token context. Strong on long document retrieval and semantic search. Matryoshka representation allows truncating to smaller dimensions without retraining. Apache 2.0 licence.

name: sentence-transformers/all-minilm-l6-v2
description: Compact and fast English sentence embedding model. Good for high-throughput semantic search and clustering where latency matters more than top-tier accuracy. 384-dimensional output.

name: sentence-transformers/sentence-t5-large
description: English sentence embedding model based on T5-Large. Strong on semantic textual similarity and sentence retrieval tasks. Higher quality than smaller MiniLM variants at the cost of inference time.

name: thenlper/gte-large
description: 335M English embedding model with strong MTEB benchmark scores. Fast and compact. Good for high-throughput semantic search where bge-m3 is too heavy. MIT licence.

name: dslim/bert-base-ner
description: BERT-base named entity recognition model. Extracts persons, organisations, locations, and miscellaneous entities from text. Good for document parsing and entity extraction pipelines.

name: dslim/bert-large-ner
description: BERT-large named entity recognition model. Higher accuracy than the base variant for entity extraction. Better suited for precision-sensitive document parsing tasks.

name: openai/privacy-filter
description: PII detection and privacy filtering model. Identifies personal information in text including names, addresses, and identifiers. Used in data sanitisation pipelines before downstream processing.

name: facebook/mms-tts-cym
description: Welsh text-to-speech model from Meta MMS. One of very few open-weight TTS models with Welsh language support.

name: facebook/mms-tts-deu
description: German text-to-speech model from Meta MMS.

name: facebook/mms-tts-eng
description: English text-to-speech model from Meta MMS. Fast and lightweight for speech synthesis in English.

name: facebook/mms-tts-fin
description: Finnish text-to-speech model from Meta MMS.

name: facebook/mms-tts-fra
description: French text-to-speech model from Meta MMS.

name: facebook/mms-tts-nld
description: Dutch text-to-speech model from Meta MMS.

name: facebook/mms-tts-spa
description: Spanish text-to-speech model from Meta MMS.

name: cvssp/audioldm2
description: Latent diffusion model for general audio and sound effect generation. Produces diverse audio from text prompts. Good for sound design and non-music audio generation.

name: facebook/musicgen-small
description: Small music generation model from Meta. Generates short audio clips from text descriptions. Good for background music generation and audio prototyping.

name: black-forest-labs/flux.1-schnell
description: FLUX.1 Schnell from Black Forest Labs. Fast high-quality text-to-image generation. Schnell variant optimised for speed with minimal quality trade-off.

name: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-3.5-large-turbo
description: Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large Turbo from Stability AI. High-quality text-to-image generation with strong prompt adherence.

name: tongyi-mai/z-image-turbo
description: Z-Image Turbo excels in photorealistic image generation, bilingual text rendering (English & Chinese), and robust instruction adherence.
